summary: Tested PUT endpoints (sales, expenses, other-income) and DailySidebar edit flow. PUT endpoints work individually. However a CRITICAL backend bug blocks the entire sidebar feature: GET /api/sales returns HTTP 500 (ResponseValidationError) due to legacy sales documents missing the new required fields (product_id, product_name, cost_price, store). Because GET /api/sales fails, the DailySidebar cannot list ANY sale records, the Edit2 buttons never render, and the edit modal is unreachable from the UI. Expense and other-income lists work and could be edited via the new modal, but the sales path is broken end-to-end.
passed: POST /api/expenses then PUT /api/expenses/{id} -> 200, payload updated correctly
POST /api/other-income then PUT /api/other-income/{id} -> 200, payload updated correctly
POST /api/sales (with product_id+cost_price) and PUT /api/sales/{id} -> 200 (PUT logic itself works)
GET /api/expenses?date_filter=today and GET /api/other-income?date_filter=today return today's records
Frontend loads, dashboard renders, daily-sidebar element exists with date header

failed.issue: Endpoint returns HTTP 500 (always) due to fastapi.exceptions.ResponseValidationError. Legacy sales documents in MongoDB lack required fields product_id, product_name, cost_price, store (they have an old 'product' field). Pydantic response model rejects them, breaking the whole list response.
failed.evidence: curl GET /api/sales -> HTTP 500 'Internal Server Error'. backend.err.log: 'ResponseValidationError: 4 validation errors ... loc: (response, 10, product_id/product_name/cost_price/store), msg: Field required, input: {product: "Bravery Salmon Gatos 7 KG", ...}'

failed.issue: Sidebar shows 'No hay registros hoy' and VENTAS=$0 even though dashboard 'Total Hoy' shows $116.345. Caused by the GET /api/sales 500 above. As a result, no sale rows render and the new 'Editar' (Edit2) buttons never appear in the sidebar.
failed.evidence: Sidebar inner_text after login: 'VENTAS $0 / EGRESOS $0 / OTROS $0 / No hay registros hoy'. Sidebar buttons count = 0, sidebar data-testids = []. No svg.lucide-edit-2 / lucide-pencil found anywhere on the page.

failed.issue: Could not verify: 'register sale -> appears in sidebar -> click Editar -> modal pre-fills -> save -> sidebar updates'. UI attempt to create a sale via SalesForm also failed with toast 'Debes seleccionar un producto del inventario' because the product suggestion dropdown did not surface for the typed term. Even if it had, GET /api/sales would still 500 and the sidebar would stay empty.
failed.evidence: Toast error 'Debes seleccionar un producto del inventario' after submit; sidebar text unchanged before/after submit.

action_items: Fix GET /api/sales 500: make Sale response model fields product_id/product_name/cost_price/store Optional (with defaults) OR run a one-time migration filling them from the legacy 'product' field and a default store, OR skip/repair invalid docs in the list handler.

Once GET /api/sales returns 200, re-test the DailySidebar: confirm sale rows render, Edit2 button appears per row, edit modal opens pre-filled, PUT /api/sales/{id} from modal updates the row, sidebar totals refresh via refreshTrigger.
Optional: verify SalesForm product autocomplete actually shows suggestions when the user types (the dropdown did not appear for 'Bravery' in our test, blocking new sale creation from UI).
